idea-plugin.name: Reasonix GUI
idea-plugin.description:
Reasonix AI assistant sidebar for JetBrains IDEs. Chat with Reasonix AI, ask questions about your code, and get intelligent responses directly in your IDE.
Features: - Sidebar chat panel - Select code and ask questions about it - Markdown rendering for responses - Works in all JetBrains IDEs (PyCharm, IDEA, GoLand, WebStorm...)
